name: tentors26-route-i-dashboard
description: Live Route I dashboard for Polar Explorer Scouts (IF), Ten Tors 2026.

scripts.build:parser: esbuild scripts/lib/parser.mjs --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node20 --outfile=scripts/lib/parser.bundle.mjs --legal-comments=none --banner:js="import { createRequire as __cr } from 'module'; const require = __cr(import.meta.url);"
